nodes.label: Dance video -> animated 3D Blender armature, in one command.      .venv/bin/pyth
nodes.norm_label: dance video -> animated 3d blender armature, in one command.      .venv/bin/pyth

nodes.label: One Euro filter over one axis of one landmark. None = dropped frame -> reset.
nodes.norm_label: one euro filter over one axis of one landmark. none = dropped frame -> reset.

nodes.label: Velocity-adaptive One Euro low-pass per landmark axis: heavy smoothing when a
nodes.norm_label: velocity-adaptive one euro low-pass per landmark axis: heavy smoothing when a

nodes.label: Enforce constant bone lengths. MediaPipe's world landmarks let limbs stretch
nodes.norm_label: enforce constant bone lengths. mediapipe's world landmarks let limbs stretch

nodes.label: Plant the feet on the ground so hip sway/bob shows over stationary feet.      Me
nodes.norm_label: plant the feet on the ground so hip sway/bob shows over stationary feet.      me

nodes.label: Run MediaPipe over the video, clean the landmarks, write JSON. venv only.
nodes.norm_label: run mediapipe over the video, clean the landmarks, write json. venv only.

nodes.label: Build a baked stick-figure armature from the landmark JSON. Blender/bpy only.
nodes.norm_label: build a baked stick-figure armature from the landmark json. blender/bpy only.

nodes.label: Blender side: open a built .blend and dump each bone's world head/tail at n
nodes.norm_label: blender side: open a built .blend and dump each bone's world head/tail at n

nodes.label: venv side: pull the baked bones out of the .blend and render a contact sheet —
nodes.norm_label: venv side: pull the baked bones out of the .blend and render a contact sheet —

nodes.label: Run the cleanup passes over a synthetic noisy skeleton (stdlib only, no video,
nodes.norm_label: run the cleanup passes over a synthetic noisy skeleton (stdlib only, no video,

nodes.label: venv-side orchestration for one video: extract -> Blender -> .blend.
nodes.norm_label: venv-side orchestration for one video: extract -> blender -> .blend.
